prompt: We want cards to have a themeable background color, not just a themeable radius. Add a --card-bg knob that defaults to the card surface, and make sure our clients can set it in their uploaded theme file.
assertions: themes/_template.css exposes --card-bg as a commented-out override under the Cards section
components.css defines a --card-bg knob defaulting to a semantic role (var(--card)), not a raw primitive
The --card-bg example value in the template is a consumer-friendly hex, not an oklch value or a var() reference
All pre-existing template tokens (--button-bg, --badge-bg, --radius, --card-radius) are still present (nothing was dropped)
A @theme-template marker for --card-bg exists in components.css (with_skill should establish this)
